title: Modulation — Etmaal Festival
role: A/V live performance & visuals (with Skander Jaïbi)
excerpt: An audiovisual live performance with Skander Jaïbi — 3D visuals and experimental soundscapes, premiered for Modulation at Etmaal Festival.
description:
An audiovisual live performance created with Skander Jaïbi, premiered for Modulation during Etmaal — the 24-hour festival in Utrecht curated by Colin Benders. The piece fuses real-time 3D visuals with experimental, beat-driven soundscapes.
Modulation is the modular-synthesizer series run by Sonar Traffic at Kytopia in Utrecht — a night focused on hardware synths and live electronic music, where this A/V collaboration had its premiere.
credits: A/V live performance: Jaco Schilp & Skander Jaïbi. Premiered for Modulation (Sonar Traffic) at Etmaal Festival, curated by Colin Benders. Recording: Sonar Traffic.
